source: Ported from SNACKET/docs/prompt-system/snacket_prompts.json (v1.0) — adapted to the two-stage engine: scene templates receive an already-branded EV as IMAGE A and never re-instruct logo replacement on the EV.
global_rules_text:
CRITICAL — EV IDENTITY PRESERVATION: IMAGE A shows the SNACKET NitroCafé EV already branded for {{companyName}}. Reproduce this exact vehicle with 100% structural fidelity: same shape, proportions, color, wheels, driver cab, body panels, raised open gull-wing doors, three chrome faucets, metal tray, coffee machine, QR panel and all hardware. Do NOT generate a different vehicle. Do NOT alter, add, move or remove any logo or branding already present on the EV in IMAGE A — the EV branding is final.
CRITICAL — STAFF POSITIONING: every staff member (EV Operator, Brand Ambassador) stands OUTSIDE the EV, on the ground, in front of the unit. Never inside the EV, never behind the service counter, never framed within the service opening.
MANDATORY INTERACTIONS (always present regardless of crowd size): at least 1 guest receiving a printed flyer from the Brand Ambassador (or from the EV Operator if no Brand Ambassador is present), with natural eye contact and a warm smile; at least 1 guest at the service window receiving a branded beverage cup AND a pastry handed directly by the EV Operator standing outside in front of the window.
BALLOON ARCH: the balloon arch colors must EXACTLY match the colors of the client logo shown in IMAGE B — no interpretation, exact color match.

P1.name: EV Casual
P1.description: Daytime casual brand activation. Single EV Operator, no Brand Ambassador by default, urban or corporate setting.
P1.composition: EV centered. Operator outside in front of the service window (foreground-right). Guest receiving flyer (foreground-left). Guest receiving beverage + pastry at the window. Crowd fills mid and background naturally.
P1.template:
SNACKET NitroCafé EV brand activation scene — EV CASUAL.

IMAGE A = the branded {{companyName}} EV (final, do not modify). IMAGE B = the {{companyName}} logo, used ONLY as color/artwork reference for balloons, backdrop, cups and printed materials.

{{GLOBAL_RULES}}

SCENE: {{scene}}. LIGHTING: {{lighting}}.

EV UNIT: reproduce IMAGE A exactly — same camera angle (rear 3/4 view, slightly elevated), same open gull-wing doors, same branding.

TEAM:
- EV OPERATOR ({{operator_gender}}): wearing {{uniform}}. Standing OUTSIDE the EV, on the ground, in front of the service window. Handing a branded beverage cup AND a pastry to a guest at the window.
{{brand_ambassador_block}}

ACTIVATION ELEMENTS:
- Balloon arch over the EV in colors exactly matching the IMAGE B logo.

CROWD: {{crowd_size}} scattered naturally — chatting, looking toward the EV, walking by.

COMPOSITION: {{composition}}

PHOTOGRAPHY: {{photo_style}}, 8K, photorealistic depth of field, f/5.6, 35mm lens.

{{notes_block}}

P2.name: EV Red Carpet + Backdrop
P2.description: Upscale dusk activation with red carpet, step-and-repeat backdrop, professional photographer, and Chauvet Par H9 LED lights. No VIP furniture area.
P2.crowd_size: 15-20 attendees in cocktail / business formal attire
P2.composition: EV anchors the left side. Backdrop and red carpet in mid-background. Photographer to the side. Wide establishing shot with cinematic depth of field.
P2.photographer_detail: Professional photographer (male, all in black, holding a DSLR with telephoto lens) standing to the side, shooting 3-4 elegantly dressed guests posing together in front of the step-and-repeat. Additional guests nearby holding up phones to photograph the posing group.
P2.chauvet_lighting_detail: 4x Chauvet DJ Freedom Par H9 IP LED fixtures placed on the floor in front of the red carpet, facing upward toward the backdrop, projecting vivid colored wash lighting onto the backdrop surface. Fixtures clearly identifiable with their housing visible.

P3.name: EV VIP
P3.description: Premium VIP activation combining red carpet, backdrop, Chauvet LED lights, and a VIP lounge area (3 cocktail tables + 6 white bar stools) immediately beside the EV.
P3.composition: EV anchors one side. VIP lounge area flows beside it as one unified premium space. Backdrop and red carpet in mid-background. Wide cinematic establishing shot.
P3.photographer_detail: Professional photographer (male, all in black, holding a DSLR with telephoto lens) standing to the side, shooting 3-4 elegantly dressed guests posing together in front of the step-and-repeat. Additional guests nearby holding up phones to photograph the posing group.
P3.chauvet_lighting_detail: 4x Chauvet DJ Freedom Par H9 IP LED fixtures placed on the floor in front of the red carpet, facing upward toward the backdrop, projecting vivid colored wash lighting onto the backdrop surface. Fixtures clearly identifiable with their housing visible.
P3.vip_area_detail: VIP lounge area immediately beside the EV forming one cohesive branded space: 3 tall cocktail tables with white stretch spandex covers. 2 white tufted leather bar stools with chrome base at each table (6 stools total). Stool spec: square-tufted padded seat cushion, chrome ring footrest, single chrome pedestal base. Guests seated and standing at the tables in elegant attire, drinks in hand, conversing warmly.

uniform.brand_casual: brand casual: fitted branded polo shirt, clean chinos, white sneakers
uniform.formal_chic: formal chic: tailored blazer, dress shirt or blouse, slim trousers or pencil skirt, dress shoes
uniform.sporty: sporty: performance zip-up jacket, jogger pants, athletic sneakers
uniform.all_black: all-black slim uniform: fitted black turtleneck, tailored black trousers, black leather sneakers

brand_ambassador.female: - BRAND AMBASSADOR (female, elegant woman, late 20s): wearing {{uniform}}. Standing OUTSIDE the EV on the ground. Handing a printed flyer to a nearby guest with warm eye contact and a confident smile.
brand_ambassador.male: - BRAND AMBASSADOR (male, charismatic man, late 20s): wearing {{uniform}}. Standing OUTSIDE the EV on the ground. Handing a printed flyer to a nearby guest with warm eye contact and a confident smile.

operator_gender.both: male and female (two operators: male handles beverage + pastry at the service window, female handles flyer distribution)

lighting.midday_sunlight: bright natural midday sunlight, warm tones, sharp natural shadows, clear blue sky
lighting.golden_hour: golden hour late afternoon, warm cinematic sunlight, long soft shadows, amber glow
lighting.dusk_twilight: dusk twilight — sky transitioning from orange-amber to deep blue, not fully dark, LED event lights visibly glowing, atmospheric
lighting.overcast: overcast soft diffused natural light, even shadows, clean professional look

photo_style.editorial_lifestyle: editorial lifestyle photography, warm moody tones
photo_style.drone_aerial: drone aerial perspective, bird's eye view
photo_style.highend_event: high-end event photography, sharp foreground, cinematic bokeh background

scene.urban_plaza_corporate: modern urban plaza surrounded by glass office towers, midday sun, city workers in business casual attire
scene.corporate_campus: outdoor corporate campus courtyard, manicured trees, modern buildings, employees with lanyards
scene.mall_open_air: upscale open-air lifestyle plaza, bright afternoon, shoppers and families
scene.festival: outdoor festival grounds, crowd, golden hour lighting, colorful flags and tents
scene.rooftop_dusk: rooftop terrace at dusk, city skyline in background, cocktail attire guests, elegant warm ambient lighting
scene.residential: residential apartment complex courtyard, sunny afternoon, pool area nearby, casual residents
scene.tailgate: parking lot tailgate, sports pre-game event, team colors, excited fans, high energy
scene.graduation: outdoor graduation ceremony lawn, families in festive attire, warm sunny day
scene.outdoor_upscale_venue_dusk: upscale outdoor event venue at dusk, open-air plaza, warm ambient lighting, city background, premium event atmosphere
scene.hotel_ballroom: elegant hotel ballroom or convention center lobby, marble floors, crystal chandeliers, formally dressed attendees
scene.corporate_lobby: modern corporate office lobby, floor-to-ceiling windows, polished concrete floors, employees in business attire
scene.convention_expo: large indoor conference center exhibitor hall, branded booths, professional crowd, indoor event lighting
scene.mall_atrium: upscale indoor shopping mall atrium, natural light from skylights, shoppers on multiple levels
scene.gallery_showroom: chic gallery or showroom space, white walls, minimalist decor, intimate product launch crowd in cocktail attire
scene.university: modern university or community center common area, students and young professionals, natural light through large windows
scene.auto_dealership: luxury car dealership showroom, polished floors, premium vehicles on display, VIP client event, sophisticated warm lighting
